ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_type" TEXT /* Type of person (e.g., customer, employee) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the person */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person record was last updated */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Status of consent for data collection */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was last updated */,
  "store_layout" TEXT /* Description of the store layout */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of operation for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_num" INTEGER /* Number or identifier of the sensor within the store */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor's location within the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor record was last updated */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., motion, camera) */,
  "sensitivity_level" TEXT /* Sensitivity level of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "person_id" TEXT /* Reference to the person being tracked */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "receive_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was received */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the person's location */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the person's location */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the person or object detected */,
  "area_stay_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  "detection_type" TEXT /* Type of detection (e.g., entry, exit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the area is located */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "x_bounds" TEXT /* Bounds for the X-coordinates of the area */,
  "y_bounds" TEXT /* Bounds for the Y-coordinates of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area record was last updated */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., checkout, entrance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the user accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "person_id" TEXT /* Reference to the person providing feedback */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the staff is allocated */,
  "staff_id" TEXT /* ID of the staff member */,
  "shift_date" TEXT /* Date of the shift */,
  "shift_time" TEXT /* Time of the shift */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_allocation_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., theft, vandalism) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time of response to the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_incidents_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
